📌 [...] Hey everyone! 👋 Ella here, maker and founder of Buzzy. We are already facing a critical transition point where AI videos are starting to move into real production pipelines instead of being just a funny toy. That's why we build Buzzy. What it is: Buzzy is the first truly agentic infinite canvas for that revolutionizes the video generation in filmmaking and TVC ads landscape. What makes it different: It's no longer a 15-second short GIF, but 20-minute blockbuster films or studio-quality ads!😲 Creators get full control of every scene using Buzzy's infinite canvas and more than 50 tools and more than 70 image and video models, and the whole workflow is enhanced and accelerated by the smartest agent on the canvas. The seamless integration of canvas and multi-model agent empowers creators,

results.title: Hi Product Hunt! Meet Advivi: Your AI Co-Director for Video Ads : Advivi Discussion Forums | Product Hunt
results.content:
Advivi is an AI Video Ad Generator that works like your personal creative director. You don't need complex prompting skills or video editing experience.

How it works:

1. Chat to Create: Just type your product idea. Advivi chats with you to nail down the hook, mood, and visual style.

2. Auto-Storyboard: It automatically breaks your idea down into a professional frames cinematic storyboard.

3. Multi-Model Magic: We integrate top-tier models (like Sora, Veo, Kling, etc.) to generate ultra-realistic footage, voiceovers, and BGM.

4. Tweak & Export: Not happy with a specific shot? Regenerate just that frame or edit the text directly in our built-in canvas.

Our goal is to help solo founders, marketers, and small agencies scale their video ad testing without breaking the bank. [...] ### Topic Forums

# Hi Product Hunt! Meet Advivi: Your AI Co-Director for Video Ads

Airbrush Studio

Airbrush Studio

Hey Product Hunt community!

I’m thrilled to introduce Advivi today!

Creating high-converting video ads for TikTok, Instagram, or Shopify usually takes a whole team: a scriptwriter, a director, an animator, and an editor. It's expensive and time-consuming. We built Advivi to change that. [...] We would absolutely love your feedback!

- What kind of products would you want to create ads for?

- How do you handle video ad creation right now?

I’ll be here all day answering questions. Let’s make some awesome ads together!

Cheers,

[Tintin] & The Advivi Team
